fullArticle:
Andrea Riseborough (To Leslie, The Regime) is set to star opposite Jeremy Strong and Barry Pepper in 9/12, Paramount+‘s upcoming six-episode limited series about ailing 9/11 first responders’ David vs. Goliath legal fight for compensation.

Written and directed by Tobias Lindholm and written by Frank Pugliese, 9/12 dramatizes a landmark case that reshaped the fight for accountability: a relentless legal war that stretched nearly a decade to secure almost $1 billion in compensation for first responders who fell gravely ill in the wake of 9/11.

Strong stars as renowned class action lawyer Jason Smith, who risked everything to take on entrenched institutions, exposing the politics, greed, corruption and betrayal that compounded tragedy set against the emergency workers’ remarkable unity and ...
